SaveManager - Class in io
Utility class responsible for saving and loading the simulation state using binary serialization.
SaveManager() - Constructor for class io.SaveManager
 
saveSimulation(Graph, List<Agent>, String) - Static method in class io.SaveManager
Saves the graph and the agents into a binary file.

Creates a bold section title.

selectedEdge - Variable in class controller.GraphController

selectedNode - Variable in class controller.GraphController
Currently selected node, used to create an edge with a second click

Currently selected node for visual highlighting

Displays statistics for an edge.

Displays general information about the whole graph.

simulation - package simulation
 
SimulationBar - Class in ui
Bottom control bar for simulation playback.

SimulationController - Class in controller
Controller responsible for building and configuring the simulation engine.

SimulationEngine - Class in simulation
Manages the execution of the simulation.

Creates a new simulation engine.
SLOW - Enum constant in enum class model.AgentType
Agent moving at half the normal speed (0.5).
SlowAgent - Class in model
Agent that moves at half the normal speed (0.5).

Creates a slow agent with speed 0.5.

speed - Variable in class model.Agent
